calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-13-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Dept. 501 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Daniel Bornstein, Esq. for the Plaintiff: Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.
Plaintiff's Witness Derrick Rems was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Dollie Ross.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1075 Gilman Ave., San Francisco, CA
The lease is forfeited.
Holdover damages - $4,400.00
Costs - $240.00
Total - $4,640.00

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CONTINUANCE CALENDAR FOR UD JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-13-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Sep-10-2012 Continued To Sep-13-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-06-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank N.A, is present. Represented by Derrick Reams.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Dollie Ross IS NOT present, Sally Ross (daughter) is present on her behalf.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein representing the defendant through limited scope.

Counsel and Ms. Ross confer in hallway. A settlement agreement that will be presented to Ms. Dollie Ross for her review.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of SEP-10-2012 remains on calendar.
